title: Nuage Hayfever Cooling & Refreshing Face Mist Spray - Revives Dry Eyes & Skin | Suitable for Daily Use (15ml)

features: INSTANT COOLING RELIEF: Instantly cool and refresh, this face mist spray helps soothe dry, irritated skin & tired eyes. Perfect for those hot summer days or after exposure to harsh weather conditions. Simply spray & feel the immediate calming effect

SUITABLE FOR HAYFEVER SUFFERERS: Enriched with Japanese Honeysuckle & Cassia Tora Seed extract, providing relief from pollen-related irritation. Whether commuting, exercising outdoors, or spending time in nature, it helps refresh & comfort skin

DAILY SKINCARE ESSENTIAL: Hydration is known to aid comfortable, healthy skin, this lightweight mist is ideal for use throughout the day or night. Perfect pocket size item for use outdoors or simply a quick fresh moisture boost throughout the day

REVIVES TIRED EYES & SKIN: Long hours in front of screens or exposure to air conditioning can leave skin feeling tight and dry. This face mist restores moisture and revitalises skin, leaving it feeling cool, soft, and refreshed with every use

CONVENIENT TRAVEL SIZE: At just 15ml, this compact bottle is the perfect travel companion. Whether heading to work, the gym, or on holiday, keep it in a handbag or pocket for an instant skin pick-me-up whenever needed

SUITABLE FOR ALL SKIN TYPES, DAY & NIGHT: The Nuage formula mist is soothing & gentle enough for use throughout the day or night as required. Simply close eyes and spray onto the face as and when required for soothing, cool relief & hydration
description: Product Description Nuage Face Mist Spray, instantaneously soothes, refreshes and revives irritated eyes and skin. Enriched with Japanese Honeysuckle & Cassia Tora Seed extract suitable for hay fever sufferers. Gentle enough to be applied daily. Ready to use, close eyes and mouth before application, spray onto face as required. Nuage Face Mist Spray, refreshes dry and irritated skin through the day. Do not use on damaged or broken skin. Nuage Hay fever Cooling & Refreshing Face Mist Spray, 15ml. Replace cap after each use. Store in a cool dry place. Search Amazon.co.uk for the Nuage range of products Ingredients Aqua, Borneol, Cassia Tora Seed Extract, Lonicera Japonica (Honeysuckle) Flower Extract, Chrysanthemum Indicum Flower Extract, Polyaminopropyl Biguanide. Directions Close eyes before application and spray the Nuage cooling Face Mist onto face as required. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with water. Do not apply to damaged or broken skin. If irritation occurs, discontinue use. See more
